connectivity_tips.tip: There are many SIM Card providers in the UK. I would recommend Three. The best place to buy a sim card is at the airport kiosks. Even if you do not purchase an international roaming plan for your current India number, remember to activate roaming so that you receive messages (important for things like OTPs).
